name: Portugal
source: REN (Redes Energeticas Nacionais), 2023. Domestic generation derived from REN consumption shares (renewables 31.2 TWh = 61%; non-renewable 10 TWh = 19%; remainder net imports).
notes: Portugal has no nuclear in reality; it appears only as a hypothetical replacement candidate to compare against wind/solar/hydro for absorbing retiring gas. Domestic generation total ~41 TWh.
